Metadata.homeTitle: JoinMyPDF — merge, compress & split PDFs in your browser
Metadata.homeDescription: Merge, compress, split, and convert PDFs in your browser. No uploads to our servers, no watermark on standard output, no signup required to start.
Metadata.siteTitle: JoinMyPDF — Private PDF tools in your browser
Metadata.siteDescription: Merge, split, compress, and convert PDFs locally in your browser. No watermark on standard output, no forced signup for typical use, and files stay on your device during processing.

Hero.headline: Seamless PDF tasks, right in your browser, running fully-locally.
Hero.subheadline: JoinMyPDF runs tools locally for maximum speed and absolute privacy.
Hero.defaultHeadline: Merge, compress, and edit PDFs in your browser—nothing is uploaded to our servers.
Hero.privateBody: Your documents never leave your device. Everything happens in your browser.
Hero.fastBody: No queues, no wait times. Files are handled instantly locally.
Hero.limitsBody: Enjoy standard downloads without watermarks or forced signups.

Home.pickToolDescription: Every workflow opens in one click—same layout, same privacy model.
Home.browseAllToolsDescription: Full directory of merge, compress, convert, sign, and protect workflows—including long-tail pages for mobile, deadlines, and sensitive documents.
Home.guidesSectionDescription: Short tutorials that link straight into the tools so your team can repeat the same steps every time.

CookieConsent.title: Cookie preferences
CookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic via Google Analytics.

ToolsDirectory.title: All PDF tools
ToolsDirectory.description: {count}+ workflows for merge, compress, convert, sign, and protect—every tool runs locally in your browser. No uploads to our servers.
ToolsDirectory.startHereDescription: Popular merge, compress, convert, sign, and protect workflows.
ToolsDirectory.whyLocalBody: Upload-based PDF sites copy your file to their servers. JoinMyPDF delivers JavaScript; your browser does the work. Open DevTools → Network and verify—your PDF never leaves your device.

HeroDropzone.title: Drop PDFs here to merge
HeroDropzone.description: Your files open in the merge tool, ready to run—reorder pages, then download.

ScenarioWins.heading: Built for real workflows
ScenarioWins.subheading: Same tools—whether you are closing the month or shipping a client pack.
ScenarioWins.invoicesBody: Combine multiple PDFs, compress if your mailbox has a size cap, and send one attachment instead of ten.
ScenarioWins.legalBody: Assemble exhibits locally, split signed pages, and export only what reviewers need.
ScenarioWins.photosBody: Turn phone photos into a single ordered PDF for claims, inspections, or coursework—no desktop install.

SocialProof.body: Use JoinMyPDF in Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge—desktop or mobile—when you need reliable PDF utilities without routing files through a generic upload service.

Partners.mapDiagramBody: Creating a presentation or workflow? Build flowcharts & system designs visually with <brand>MapDiagram</brand>, then bring them here to merge.
Partners.wattQuickBody: Check out <brand>WattQuick</brand> — our free suite of auto loan trackers, debt calculators, and green home tools.

Footer.brandDescription: Merge, compress, convert, and secure PDFs in your browser. Files stay on your device—no uploads to our servers.

taglines.tools: JoinMyPDF — browser-based PDF tools with local processing.
taglines.blog: JoinMyPDF — guides for PDF workflows, email limits, and mobile tips.

Blog.metaDescription: Practical JoinMyPDF guides for merge, compress, split, and privacy-first PDF workflows—written for humans.
Blog.title: Latest Guides & Articles
Blog.description: Walkthroughs that link straight into the tools—built for real tasks like email limits, mobile workflows, and sensitive documents.
